title: The Digital Archaeology Toolkit Project: Prototypes and Next Steps
author: Starry, Rachel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The  #DigArchToolkit  is a collaborative, crowdsourced endeavor to curate toolkits - recommended digital tools and practical learning resources - for common archaeological research methods and workflows.
steps_raw: The  #DigArchToolkit  is a collaborative, crowdsourced endeavor to curate toolkits - recommended digital tools and practical learning resources - for common archaeological research methods and workflows.
